(2) iOS — add BGTaskSchedulerPermittedIdentifiers to Info.plist; register BGAppRefreshTask / BGProcessingTask in ReaderApp.swift via BGTaskScheduler.shared.register; add UNUserNotificationCenter.current().requestAuthorization in AppEntry; post UNNotificationRequest for download/sync completion. blockers.mitigation: Audit 2026-06-27 found all 5 ArkTS pages (Index.ets Tab container + BookshelfPage / SearchPage / ReaderPage / SettingsPage) routed through fixture-based services. HomeDashboardService uses MockBookshelfRepository(true) + FixtureReplayInterceptor + 3 fixture:// sources. SearchService uses BridgeClientWithFallback(BridgeHTTPClient, FixtureReplayInterceptor). ReaderPage uses FixtureEPUBParserAdapter + buildStoredEPUBFixture() with hardcoded content '在中国，任何超脱飞扬的思想...'. SettingsPage has no 'import source' entry. None of the 5 pages call ReaderCoreRuntime.send/request. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-27-harmonyos-rust-core-integration-s6.md Task 5 creates ReaderCoreClient App singleton + BookApi/SourceApi facade, Task 6 retires fixture services (strangler pattern: deprecate not delete), Task 7 modifies 5 pages' ViewModel layer to consume RustCore*Service. Blocks: HarmonyOS cannot pass Legado source search→detail→toc→content vertical via Rust Core. Verification: RustCoreEndToEndTest asserts non-fixture path + real Legado source pipeline green on simulator.
blockers.reason: HarmonyOS 5-page UI business path completely not connected to Rust Core; all pages route through MockBookshelfRepository / FixtureReplayInterceptor / BridgeClientWithFallback / FixtureEPUBParserAdapter. Legado search→detail→toc→content cannot run via Rust Core.

blockers.mitigation: Fix plan (priority: P1, blocks Android 朗读能力; violates AGENTS.md TTS 策略 §2 '发声归 Host 系统级 TTS, Android TextToSpeech'). Files to change: (1) Create RealAndroidTtsAdapter.kt under app/src/main/kotlin/com/reader/android/data/adapter/ implementing AndroidTtsAdapter interface — wrap android.speech.tts.TextToSpeech: TextToSpeech(context, InitListener) in init(), setLanguage(Locale('zh','CN')), speak(text, TextToSpeech.QUEUE_ADD, params, utteranceId) in speak(), stop() + shutdown() in lifecycle; add UtteranceProgressListener (onStart/onDone/onError) to drive Core TTS queue state machine callbacks. (2) Replace FakeAndroidTtsAdapter injection with RealAndroidTtsAdapter in AppProvider.kt wiring (keep Fake for unit tests). Legado reference: legado/app/src/main/java/io/legado/app/service/TTSReadAloudService.kt + BaseReadAloudService.kt (foreground Service wrapping android.speech.tts.TextToSpeech with UtteranceProgressListener + zh-CN voice + rate/pitch control). Internal parity reference: iOS iOS/Features/Reader/ReaderTTSPlayer.swift (AVSpeechSynthesizer + delegate + rate control + zh-CN voice) + HarmonyOS entry/src/main/ets/platform/SystemTtsAdapter.ets (@kit.CoreSpeechKit textToSpeech.createEngine + SpeakListener + state machine). Verification: ReaderPage TTS plays zh-CN speech on emulator.

AndroidTtsAdapter.kt:1-26 only defines AndroidTtsAdapter interface (:8-16) + FakeAndroidTtsAdapter (:18-26, delegates to FakeTtsEngine). 0 grep hits for android.speech.tts / TextToSpeech / UtteranceProgressListener — no class instantiates android.speech.tts.TextToSpeech. Violates AGENTS.md TTS 策略 §2 (发声归 Host 系统级 TTS, Android TextToSpeech). iOS + HarmonyOS already complete (ReaderTTSPlayer.swift AVSpeechSynthesizer / SystemTtsAdapter.ets @kit.CoreSpeechKit).

blockers.mitigation: Split CSS/shorthand rules on &&/||/%% operators before feeding to scraper::Selector::parse (mirror evaluate_json_path_expression split logic). Legado AnalyzeRule.splitSourceRule does cross-type splitting.
blockers.reason: Core only splits &&/||/%% in evaluate_json_path_expression (JSONPath layer). CSS/shorthand path feeds combined selectors (e.g. class.ser-ret@li||class.j_bookList@li) directly to scraper::Selector::parse which fails. Affects search/detail/toc for sources using MultiRule operators on CSS rules.
